title: vigna unguiculata subsp. unguiculata
intro: Vigna unguiculata subsp. unguiculata, commonly known as cowpea or black-eyed pea, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of consuming Vigna unguiculata subsp. unguiculata include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, managing diabetes, and providing essential nutrients like protein and fiber. Herbal preparations of Vigna unguiculata subsp. unguiculata may include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
